'''Curdik''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Whiphid/Legends|Whiphid]] swordsman.

==Biography==
Born mute on [[Toola/Legends|Toola]], Curdik learned to communicate through his weapons and his [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]].<ref name="AIR" />

In the years after the formation of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Curdik worked as a scout for off-world hunters that visited Toola. Bored with serving tourists, Curdik left his homeworld and traveled the galaxy.<ref name="AIR" />

Eventually he made his way to [[Zuliria]] where the [[Arcona/Legends|Arcona]] [[Ther-das]] noticed that he was a great swordsbeing and invited him to join the [[Zulirian Swordmasters]]. Curdik since was loyal to Ther-das, probably because Ther-das was the person who gave him a purpose, and has fought Ther-das enemies to allow the Arcona to continue with his studies.<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' {{1stm}}
